name: Debug an Error or Exception
description: Systematically investigate and fix a runtime error or unexpected exception
steps: Read the full error message and stack trace — note the file and line number
Open the file at the indicated line and read the surrounding context
Identify what value was unexpected (undefined, null, wrong type, etc.)
Trace where that value originates — check callers and data sources
Add a targeted fix; avoid changing unrelated code
Run the relevant tests to confirm the fix and check for regressions
